2: You have eight bundles of firewood, dry and ready for the stove. They should be delivered to Stephannot on the east hill ere he and his men freeze to death.
You have eight bundles of firewood, dry and ready for the stove. They should be delivered to Stephannot on the west hill ere he and his men freeze to death.

50: The area around Skyfire Locks never lacks for firewood. Collect eight bundles and deliver them to Stephannot on the east hill.
